chunks.text: When we arrived at grandmother 's house, we learned that today was her birthday.
All of us wanted to give her a special gift.
My mother gave her a pretty flower from the garden.
My father showed her an old family picture, and grandmother smiled.
My sister told her a long, funny story from school, and we all laughed together.
I bought her a new book.
Grandmother smiled at each of us and said, “ Thank you, everyone.
” It was a very warm day.
